message:
Round 16: FnvHash + Arena optimizations repo-wide

Applied tokenizer optimizations across entire PyAOT codebase.

FnvHash Migration (20+ HashMaps):
- Type inference: 3 main + 2 ClassInfo maps
- Symbol resolution: N scopes + 2 ClassRegistry
- Codegen tracking: 11 decision maps
- Import system: 1 registry + 1 temp
- Expected: 15-30% compilation speedup

Arena Allocation (4 hot functions):
- compilePythonSource() - 8 defers eliminated
- compileNotebook() - 8 defers eliminated
- compileModuleAsStructWithPrefix() - 10+ defers eliminated
- compileZig() - 15+ defers eliminated
- Expected: 10-20% speedup from reduced malloc/free

Combined Expected Impact: 25-50% faster compilation

New files:
- src/utils/fnv_hash.zig (from tokenizer)

Next: Round 17 (benchmark gains), Round 18 (profiling), Round 19 (beat rs-bpe)

files.patch:
@@ -94,12 +94,19 @@ echo "Running hyperfine benchmark (583 texts × 1000 iterations per run)..."
 echo "Note: Python startup overhead <2% with 1000 iterations"
 echo ""
 
-# Run hyperfine with explicit commands
+# Build PyAOT native binary
+if [ ! -f "zig-out/bin/bench_native" ]; then
+    echo "Building PyAOT native binary..."
+    make build > /dev/null 2>&1
+fi
+
+# Run hyperfine with explicit commands (including PyAOT native)
 hyperfine \
     --warmup 1 \
     --runs 5 \
     --export-markdown bench_encoding_results.md \
     --ignore-failure \
+    --command-name "PyAOT" "${BENCH_DIR}/zig-out/bin/bench_native" \
     --command-name "rs-bpe" "python3 /tmp/bench_enc_rsbpe.py" \
     --command-name "tiktoken" "python3 /tmp/bench_enc_tiktoken.py" \
     --command-name "TokenDagger" "python3 /tmp/bench_enc_tokendagger.py" \
